title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 28 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 28 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 28 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/01/2026
Today, the DCE iron ore futures market exhibited a volatile trend with a downward bias. The dominant contract, I2605, closed at 783 RMB/tonne,representing a decline of 0.70% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, spot prices fell by 3-5 RMB compared to the prior session.
